title: Bing SMP: Relics
description: The old gods grant you cool ass abilities!
body:
Inspired partially by the Terraria and Greek mythology, this mod adds powerful new items (Relics) that can be equipped to grant unique abilities.

# Sacrifices & Catalysts
- Sacrifice various items at a **Sacrificial Altar** for different results, from blessings to curses
- Craft catalysts with obsidian, diamond, and redstone

![Relic Catalyst recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e1fb21fb1da38be60ae19ca0eabaad5bd84d908.png)
- Bring them to life at a **Sacrificial Altar**

# Relics
- Throw the **Blessed Relic Catalyst** on the ground with specific ingredients
- Lightning strikes, and a Relic is born!
- Obtained through various means, hearts can be used to make even more powerful Relics
- Relics are one-of-a-kind; only one of each can be made!

# Classes/Races
- A class OR demi-human race is chosen when the player first spawns in, inspired by [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)

This mod was made for the Bing SMP, and basically functions as the datapack did for the previous [season](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=15EHqRu6XXo).

# Additional information
- Adds new splash text
- Bundles and netherite tools are uncraftable, excluding pickaxes, shovels, and hoes, to comply with server rules.
- Combat caps (max 1 totem, max sharp V, etc) have been implemented to comply with server rules.
- Damage-boosting Relics typically only work while holding weapons.
- The mace has been made functionally useless in combat to comply with server rules.
- A villager has been added, and its workstation is the "Identification Table". This villager sells/buys various Relic-related items, including books containing specific Relic recipes/functions, sacrifices/results, and more!
- Additional music discs have been added.
- Two new functional blocks have been added; The sacrificial altar and the identification table.
![Altar recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/355e60884b2a446c4d6c3e124802e41f9fb6bf9e.png)
![ID Table recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e1b18b3b68d8eee002ec9b8c9c87cfdd58ac4c0.png)

# Dependencies
- Currently, the only other mod required is [Inv View](https://modrinth.com/mod/inv-view-forge/version/3.0.2-1.21.(5)), but this is only relevant to a single late-game item and only needs to be installed server-side.
